en.name: Knight's Armament KS-1 5.56x45 assault rifle lower receiver (Black)
en.description: Knight's Armament Company developed the KS-1 5.56x45 carbine to set a new standard in assault platforms. Featuring completely ambidextrous, machined-in controls and built specifically around KAC's highly efficient, proprietary mechanics rather than standard AR-15 parts, this receiver serves as the foundation for modern military operations.

en.Name: Knight's Armament KS-1 low-profile gas block
en.Description: A specialized, proprietary ultra-low profile gas block manufactured by Knight's Armament. Designed to press-fit and pin directly onto the custom-profile dimpled KS-1 barrels, establishing a secure interface with KAC's straight gas tube system under URX-6 handguards.

en.name: Knight's Armament KS-1 upper receiver assembly (Black)
en.description: A proprietary KS-1 upper receiver assembly for the KAC/L403A1 weapon family, finished in standard black. Engineered specifically to index with URX-6 handguards via a shift-resistant locking notch, housing KAC's E3.2 rounded-lug bolt group.

en.name: Knight's Armament KS-1 ambidextrous charging handle (Black)
en.description: A robust, high-performance ambidextrous AR-15 charging handle manufactured by Knight's Armament. Features extended, textured latch handles to facilitate rapid charging from either side of the firearm, even with gloved hands.

en.name: Knight's Armament KS-1 11.5 inch 5.56x45 barrel (Black)
en.description: An ultra-premium, match-grade 11.5-inch barrel assembly for the KS-1 platform. Deeply dimpled with KAC's signature ball-mill cut pattern to decrease weight and accelerate heat-shedding, featuring a proprietary E3.2 barrel extension.

en.name: Knight's Armament KS-1 13.7 inch 5.56x45 barrel (Black)
en.description: A match-grade cold-hammer-forged 13.7-inch dimpled barrel, designed specifically for the KS-1 upper receiver and URX-6 handguards. This mid-length barrel configuration is most notably deployed on the British Armed Forces' L403A1 AIW system.

en.name: Knight's Armament KS-1 14.5 inch 5.56x45 barrel (Black)
en.description: An exceptionally rigid, mid-length 14.5-inch dimpled barrel for the KS-1. Deeply fluted using Knight's specialized ball-milling to dramatically speed thermal release while minimizing weight out front, utilizing the proprietary E3.2 extension.

en.name: Knight's Armament KS-1 16 inch 5.56x45 barrel (Black)
en.description: A match-grade, full-length 16-inch barrel for the KS-1 rifle system. Employs KAC's highly distinctive ball-milling process to maximize mechanical rigidity and surface cooling area while providing a notable reduction in recoil and full muzzle velocity.

en.name: Knight's Armament URX-6 10.5 inch M-LOK handguard (Black)
en.description: The Knight's Armament URX-6 10.5-inch free-floating handguard, designed specifically for the short-barreled KS-1 variants. Built with KAC's extremely rigid barrel nut design and self-indexing receiver alignment notch, completely preventing handguard rotation and protecting laser/sight zero under heavy impact.

en.name: Knight's Armament URX-6 12.75 inch M-LOK handguard (Black)
en.description: The Knight's Armament URX-6 12.75-inch free-floating M-LOK handguard. Designed specifically for standard military-length KS-1 carbines, including the British L403A1 AIW. Self-indexes with the upper receiver via an anti-rotation tab to provide a monolithic, rock-solid mounting base.

en.name: Knight's Armament URX-6 15 inch M-LOK handguard (Black)
en.description: The Knight's Armament URX-6 15-inch free-floating handguard in black. Delivers an extended mounting profile for accessory placement and support-hand control over longer-barreled KS-1 builds, without sacrificing structural rigidity.

en.name: KAC M-LOK to Picatinny mount adapter
en.description: An extremely low-profile M-LOK to Picatinny rail adapter manufactured by Knight's Armament. Engineered to provide a rugged, secure mounting point for Picatinny-compatible tactical lights, lasers, and foregrips on modern M-LOK handguards.

en.name: KAC KS-1 receiver extension
en.description: A proprietary, military-grade AR-15 receiver extension (buffer tube) designed by Knight's Armament. Built to lock securely into the KS-1 receiver, offering multiple stock adjustment positions.

en.name: Knight's Armament 5.56mm QDC 3-prong flash eliminator
en.description: The Knight's Armament Company 3-prong flash eliminator, designed for 5.56x45 barrels. Offers outstanding flash suppression characteristics and serves as the precise mounting host for the KAC QDC (Quick Disconnect Coupler) ecosystem.
